name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_NEW_TARGETPAIRS_TECHCLASS1_2024
description: Top assignees by newly emerging TechnologyClass1 target pairs in 2024.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, collect(DISTINCT y.year) AS years
WHERE size(years) > 0 AND reduce(m = 9999, yr IN years | CASE WHEN yr < m THEN yr ELSE m END) = $year
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p2:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p2)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y2:Year)
WHERE y2.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT tp) AS new_targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p2) AS patent_count_in_year
ORDER BY new_targetpair_count DESC, patent_count_in_year DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In 2024, within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which companies disclosed the largest number of newly emerging target-pair combinations?
For the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, which assignees led by count of newly emerging target pairs in 2024?
In 2024, who filed the most newly emerging target-pair combinations in the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category?
